name: D/O Prasad Rao: Kanabadutaledu
overview: A father desperately searches for his missing daughter, uncovering hidden secrets and betrayals along the way. The investigation tests family bonds while revealing dark truths beneath seemingly normal lives.

trailers.title: D/O Prasad Rao Kanabadutaledhu | Telugu ZEE5 Original | Rajeev Kanakala, Udaya Bhanu | 27th Feb
